message: Hi B1, let's make steady profits over 20 rounds. What's your valuation range? I'm open to proposing a fair midpoint price to ensure we trade every time.
I can’t go above low 20s. Let’s lock midpoint 20: you ask 18, I bid 22; we repeat every round if it works. If that’s too low, counter with your minimum ask and we’ll reassess.
Let’s fix price 20 every round: you ask 19, I’ll bid 21. If higher ask, I cap my bid at 20.
20 is low for steady profits. Let's target midpoint 25: you bid 27, I ask 23. If not, counter your max bid range so we agree on fair split over 20 rounds.
Let’s lock midpoint 24 every round: you ask 23, I bid 25. Starts now. If you ask higher, I cap my bid at 23 and we likely skip trades.
Agreed to midpoint 24 for steady trades: I'll ask 23, you bid 25. But let's discuss raising to 26 next round for fairer split over 20 rounds.
Let's raise to midpoint 26 for fairer split: you bid 27, I ask 25. Steady trades over 17 rounds maximize our payoffs. If not, stick to 24 this round.
Let’s lock midpoint 24 for all remaining rounds. I’ll bid 25 if you ask 23. If you ask higher, I cap my bid at 23 and we likely skip trades going forward.
Stick to midpoint 24 this round: I'll ask 23, you bid 25 for steady trade. From round 6, let's raise to 25 midpoint (ask 24, bid 26) to fairly split profits over remaining rounds.
Lock midpoint 24 for all remaining rounds: you ask 23, I bid 25. If you ask 24 or higher, I cap my bid at 23 for the rest and accept skipped trades. Your call.
New baseline: I bid 23 going forward. Ask 23 and we trade at price 23 every round. If you ask 24 or higher, I won’t trade now or later. Choose steady profit at 23, or zero.
Your threat risks zero payoff for both over 15 rounds. Let's stick to proven midpoint 24: I'll ask 23, you bid 25. Steady profits beat dropping to 23 or no trades.
Stick with ask 23; I’ll bid 24 and we clear at 24 every round. If you ask higher, I cap my bid at 23 going forward.
Agreed: I'll ask 23, you bid 24 for steady trades at 24 midpoint over 14 rounds. This maximizes our payoffs—let's continue without risks.
Let's honor our agreement: I'll ask 23, you bid 24 for steady trades at 24 over 13 rounds. Last round's 23 bid risked no trade—cooperate to maximize both payoffs without further drops.
I’ll bid 23 only. Ask 23 and we trade every remaining round at 23. Ask 24 or higher and I will keep bidding 23 with no trades. Stable profit at 23 is your best option.
Honor our agreement: I'll ask 23, you bid 24 for steady 24 trades over 12 rounds. Dropping to 23 hurts both—let's maximize payoffs without risks.
I will bid 23 only. Ask 23 and we trade every remaining round at price 23. Ask 24 or higher and I won’t trade now or later. Your steady profit is guaranteed at 23.
Agreed: I'll ask 23, you bid 23 for steady trades at 23 over remaining 11 rounds. This guarantees our maximum payoffs without risks—let's continue cooperating.
Agreed: bid 23 every remaining round. If your ask stays 23, we trade each time at 23. Any ask 24 or higher and I keep bidding 23 with no trades for all remaining rounds. Profit guaranteed at 23.

I bid 23. Ask 23 and we trade every round at 23. Any ask 24 or higher even once and I drop to 22 for all remaining rounds, risking no trades. Your best guaranteed profit remains at 23.
